MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Vacated

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Allow
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MODERN CLASS DESIGN LLC & VERNON DAVIS' Motion For Leave To ALLOW (1) MODERN CLASS DESIGN LLC TO FILE A VERIFIED CROSS COMPLAINT AND AMENDED ANSWER, AND (2) VERNON DAVIS TO FILE AN AMENDED ANSWER IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR7489.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
